ddls:
CREATE TABLE "establishments" (
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each establishment */,
  "establishment_name" TEXT /* Name of the establishment */,
  "establishment_type" TEXT /* Type of establishment */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the establishment */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person's name and title */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact person's email address */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact person's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the establishment */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the establishment is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the establishment is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the establishment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("establishment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "inspector_title" TEXT /* Inspector's title */,
  "inspector_specialty" TEXT /* Inspector's area of specialty */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "establishment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the establishment being inspected */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector conducting the inspection */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspection_time" TEXT /* Time of the inspection */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection */,
  "inspection_score" REAL /* Overall score of the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspection_type FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_type") REFERENCES inspection_types ("inspection_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("establishment_id") REFERENCES establishments ("establishment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspection_types" (
  "inspection_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection type */,
  "inspection_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspection type */,
  "inspection_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the inspection type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspection_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection result */,
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspection this result belongs to */,
  "item" INTEGER /* Item or area inspected */,
  "weight_sum" REAL /* Weighted sum of the inspection result */,
  "critical" INTEGER /* Whether the result is critical or not */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the inspection result */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result */,
  "result_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspection_results_inspection_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_id") REFERENCES inspections ("inspection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspection_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspection result this violation belongs to */,
  "violation_name" TEXT /* Name of the violation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  "violation_status" TEXT /* Status of the violation */,
  "violation_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES inspection_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corrective_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corrective action */,
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the violation this action addresses */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the corrective action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the corrective action */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the corrective action */,
  "action_due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the corrective action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corrective_actions_violation_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_up_inspections" (
  "follow_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up inspection */,
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspection this follow-up belongs to */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up inspection */,
  "follow_up_time" TEXT /* Time of the follow-up inspection */,
  "follow_up_status" TEXT /* Status of the follow-up inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_up_inspections_inspection_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_id") REFERENCES inspections ("inspection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)
